20.label: Sticky Note
20.description: Pin an idea or annotation note on the board.

21.label: Drop Zone
21.description: A placement zone tag. Tags dropped here activate the zone behavior.

22.label: Smart Stage
22.description: Switch the board to presentation or stage mode.

23.label: Focus Beam
23.description: Highlight a board region or spotlight target.

24.label: Imprint
24.description: Capture handwriting and save it as a note.

25.label: Lumi
25.description: Read selected writing and suggest a rewrite.

26.label: NodCheck
26.description: Start a quick comprehension or nod check.

27.label: Tony Help
27.description: Ask Tony for help or a hint.

28.label: Timer
28.description: Start or offer a classroom timer.

29.label: Gus Mode
29.description: Project Gus and switch character state.

30.label: A Room
30.description: Adapt ambience and recommend the next mode.

31.label: Forest Scene
31.description: Load the forest scene on the board.

32.label: Media Layer
32.description: Open a video, slide, or media overlay.

33.label: 3D Object
33.description: Spawn or place a 3D object on the board.

34.label: Erase / Clear
34.description: Clear projected overlays or board notes.

35.label: Write Mode
35.description: Switch into annotation and writing mode.

36.label: Slide Summary
36.description: Turn nearby board content into a projected slide or summary card.

37.label: Video Player
37.description: Project a video player or media frame on the board.

38.label: Polygon Vertex
38.description: Connect multiple vertex tags into a projected polygon or outline.

39.label: Action / Send
39.description: Commit the zone under this tag to the classroom projector or room action bus.

40.label: Figurate
40.description: Summon the room character. When present, voice and action requests route to the character response loop.
